sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57851" key="klh/qrinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλήθρ-ινος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n57851.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of the alder</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ξύλα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:17:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17.15</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κλείθρ</foreign>- codd.).</sense> </entryFree>
